descFull: >99.5% KaTeX syntax coverage. LaTeX math renderer in pure Rust. No JavaScript, no WebView, no DOM. One Rust core → iOS, Android, Flutter, Web, PNG. C ABI · WASM · Server-side PNG/SVG.
